analysis_methods: Direct local Parquet decoding; unadjusted OLS for continuous/ordinal main effects; Welch-style mean differences for binary and subgroup contrasts; multivariable OLS for adjusted main effects and interactions; p<0.05 threshold with large-sample normal/t approximations.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Across all patients, each 1-year higher `feature_041` is associated with higher mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted OLS slope for `feature_041` was 0.1699 months of pfs_months per 1-unit increase (p<1e-250).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Across all patients, each 1-unit higher ordinal `feature_036` is associated with lower mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted OLS slope for `feature_036` was -1.0992 months per 1-unit increase (p<1e-250).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_001=1` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_001=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 2.925 for `feature_001=1` versus 4.362 for `feature_001=0`; difference -1.438 months (p<1e-250).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_042=1` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_042=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 2.743 for `feature_042=1` versus 3.663 for `feature_042=0`; difference -0.921 months (p<1e-250).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_015="squamous"` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_015="adenocarcinoma"`.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 2.813 for `feature_015="squamous"` versus 3.670 for adenocarcinoma; difference -0.857 months (p<1e-250).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_025="current"` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_025` equal to `former` or `never`.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 2.987 for current versus 3.621 for non-current `feature_025`; difference -0.634 months (p<1e-250).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Across all patients, each 1-unit higher `feature_004` is associated with lower mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted OLS slope for `feature_004` was -0.0733 months per 1-unit increase (p<1e-250).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Across all patients, each 1-unit higher `feature_056` is associated with higher mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted OLS slope for `feature_056` was 0.4411 months per 1-unit increase (p<1e-250).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_010=1` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_010=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 4.114 for `feature_010=1` versus 3.332 for `feature_010=0`; difference 0.782 months (p<1e-250).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_057=1` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_057=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 2.661 for `feature_057=1` versus 3.472 for `feature_057=0`; difference -0.810 months (p<1e-250).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_009=1` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_009=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 3.641 for `feature_009=1` versus 3.319 for `feature_009=0`; difference 0.322 months (p<1e-250).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_037=1` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_037=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 3.319 for `feature_037=1` versus 3.523 for `feature_037=0`; difference -0.204 months (p<1e-250).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for `feature_041`, `feature_036`, `feature_001`, `feature_042`, `feature_015`, `feature_025`, `feature_004`, `feature_056`, `feature_010`, `feature_057`, `feature_009`, `feature_037`, and `feature_066`, `feature_028=1` independently lowers `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for `feature_028=1` was -0.0058 months (p=4.404e-1), so the hypothesized independent negative effect was not supported.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for stronger predictors, `feature_066=1` independently increases `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for `feature_066=1` was -0.0005 months (p=9.658e-1), refuting an independent positive effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for the dominant predictors, `feature_010=1` remains associated with higher `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for `feature_010=1` was 0.8921 months (p<1e-250).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for the dominant predictors, `feature_057=1` remains associated with lower `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for `feature_057=1` was -0.0266 months (p=8.090e-2), which was not statistically significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_010=1` and `pfs_months` is stronger when `feature_009=1`; the adjusted `feature_010` by `feature_009` interaction is positive.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for `feature_010 * feature_009` was 2.5344 months (p<1e-250).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within the subgroup with `feature_009=1`, patients with `feature_010=1` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_010=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Within `feature_009=1`, mean pfs_months was 5.766 for `feature_010=1` versus 3.329 for `feature_010=0`; difference 2.437 months (p<1e-250).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within the subgroup with `feature_009=0`, `feature_010=1` is not beneficial and is associated with slightly lower mean `pfs_months` than `feature_010=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Within `feature_009=0`, mean pfs_months was 3.213 for `feature_010=1` versus 3.334 for `feature_010=0`; difference -0.121 months (p=5.379e-4).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `feature_010=1` and `pfs_months` is less positive when `feature_037=1`; the adjusted `feature_010` by `feature_037` interaction is negative.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for `feature_010 * feature_037` was -1.6223 months (p<1e-250).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within the subgroup with `feature_037=0`, patients with `feature_010=1` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_010=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Within `feature_037=0`, mean pfs_months was 4.870 for `feature_010=1` versus 3.327 for `feature_010=0`; difference 1.542 months (p<1e-250).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within the subgroup with `feature_037=1`, `feature_010=1` is associated with lower mean `pfs_months` than `feature_010=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Within `feature_037=1`, mean pfs_months was 3.186 for `feature_010=1` versus 3.338 for `feature_010=0`; difference -0.152 months (p=2.993e-4).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_009=1` and `pfs_months` is concentrated among patients with `feature_037=0`; the adjusted `feature_009` by `feature_037` interaction is negative.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for `feature_009 * feature_037` was -0.5840 months (p<1e-250).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_041` and `pfs_months` weakens as ordinal `feature_036` increases; the adjusted `feature_041_z` by `feature_036` interaction is negative.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for `feature_041_z * feature_036` was -0.1422 months per 1-SD higher `feature_041` per 1-unit higher `feature_036` (p<1e-250).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_041` and `pfs_months` is weaker in patients with `feature_015="squamous"` than in patients with `feature_015="adenocarcinoma"`; the adjusted interaction is negative.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient for `feature_041_z * feature_015_squamous` was -0.1163 months per 1-SD higher `feature_041` in the squamous subgroup (p<1e-250).
